title: ComEng International - IR
description: This is an Immersive Railroading addon based around a glorious International builder that started off in Australia. Then consumed its local rivals, Then expanded to the US, with its newly assembled builder in the United States
body:
# Commonwealth Engineering International

NOTE: It does not any block/vanilla replacement textures, only content for Immersive Railroading Mod, which obviously requires Immersive Railroading

Commonwealth Engineering International (or ComEng for short) is based on an alternative history where the Australian engineering firm acquires its local competitors and expands over to America, this pack is based on the American side, ComEng International builds mostly electric Locomotives and Electric Multi Units, however, the firm also builds a decent range of Diesels and Passenger stock (and even some freight) for the US market. 

Requires Immersive railroading: [here](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-railroading?gameCategorySlug=mc-mods&projectID=277736)

# Current Stock:
**Locomotives:**
- CE-DD35F
- CE-EC45
- RP Streamliner Electric (Not sure if this is staying under ComEng atm)

*note, very WIP pack, more stock to come!*
